name: HiBob
description: Monitor HiBob employee records and job descriptions for HR compliance and employee data completeness

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to HiBob Admin
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > Service Users
3. Create a new service user with People read permissions
4. Copy and paste the generated token below

credentialFields.label: Service User Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Service User in HiBob > Settings > Integrations > Service Users

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews HiBob employee records for access management

checks.name: Employee Descriptions
checks.description: Verifies that HiBob employees have job titles set for employee descriptions
